name: private-identifiers-example
_comment: EXAMPLE template for an untracked private policy. Copy this to the pre-push hook's default path (~/.config/content-guard/internal.json) or to policies/private-repo.local.json, then replace the placeholder patterns with your own real identifiers. NEVER commit the filled-in copy. Because the real file is untracked, keep it in an encrypted backup so it survives a machine rebuild.
_rules_comment: Downgrade the generic built-in infra rules to warn (mirrors public-repo.json). Without this, the broad infrastructure:block default re-flags ordinary loopback / local host / port references that appear in normal docs and code. Your custom_rules below still BLOCK via their category defaults.
_allow_values_comment: Known-public, non-secret literals to exempt everywhere, including history scans of old commit diffs where inline 'content-guard: allow' markers cannot reach. Exact full-string match only (a substring does not exempt a larger match). Apply to other scans with: git_scan --allow-values-from <this-file>.
